creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
Heino,

I have also tried to reproduce your clementine problems, to no avail.

I tried to build and install and package clementine-player on 9.2-amd64
(not converted to pkgNG), which worked, and I used poudriere to
test-build clementine-player on 9.1-amd64, which was also successful.

I also checked the 3rdparty/libmplayer sources, and the CMakeLists.txt
pretty clearly states an installation directory that matches the pkg-plist.

I do not see how adding NO_STAGE would make a difference - if you can
upload compressed logs of a build made with NO_STAGE, and of a build
without NO_STAGE, and a list of your options ("make
pretty-print-config"), that might help in finding the problem.

Else I am tempted to believe that _some_ part in your build is stale.
If NFS or thereabouts are involved, clocks may have drifted, if you use
compilation accelerators/caches like ccache, that might also impair the
build.

HTH.

Cheers
Matthias
